name: Quick Salsa
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups no salt tomato or V-8 juice
1 tsp garlic powder (NOT garlic salt) or fresh/bottled garlic
Pepper sauce to taste (try 10 drops first)
recipeInstructions:
1 In a 12 oz. jar, put onions.
2 Add all other dried, fresh, or frozen ingredients.
3 Add juice and hot sauce/pepper.
4 Shake well and let sit overnight in the refrigerator.
5 Open, add more juice to top, shake very well, serve.
Hint: You can buy fresh green onion and cilantro, chop it, then freeze it in a zip-lock baggie for future use.
